filter_undefined_race_condition.description: Component expects array data but hook returns single object
trigger_signatures: TypeError: arr.filter is not a function
root_causes: Hook returns single object instead of array
Component assumes array structure without validation
Missing loading/error states during async operations
Interface contract not enforced with TypeScript

defensive_initialization.description: Always initialize arrays with empty defaults

null_safety_guards.description: Check data existence before array operations

loading_states.description: Explicit loading management prevents race conditions

interface_validation.description: TypeScript interfaces enforce return type contracts

test_patterns.name: initial_state_safety
test_patterns.description: Verify hook returns safe defaults on mount

test_patterns.name: loading_state_transitions
test_patterns.description: Test loading states prevent premature operations

test_patterns.name: array_operation_safety
test_patterns.description: Validate array methods work during all states

common_locations: Components using array methods on hook data

hook_development: Test initial return values are safe defaults
Verify loading states prevent premature operations
Validate interface contracts with consuming components
Test error states don't break component assumptions
component_integration: Test component behavior with undefined/null data
Verify loading UI displays during data fetch
Test error boundaries handle hook failures
Validate array operations with empty/undefined data
